questions: how do I get to SA1
sut ydw i n cyrraedd campws SA1?
campws SA1 Glan y Dŵr Abertawe
answer_en: The UWTSD SA1 campus is the IQ Building at SA1 Swansea Waterfront, Swansea, SA1 8EW. It is within walking distance of Swansea city centre and Swansea Train Station. Regular bus services run across the city — plan your journey at traveline.cymru. Free parking is available on site, and the nearest NCP is Orchard Street (SA1 5AS). For directions: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae campws SA1 PCYDDS yn yr Adeilad IQ ar SA1 Glannau Abertawe, Abertawe, SA1 8EW. Mae o fewn pellter cerdded o ganol dinas Abertawe a Gorsaf Trenau Abertawe. Gallwch gynllunio eich taith ar traveline.cymru. Am fwy o wybodaeth: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: where is the art campus Swansea
sut i gyrraedd campws Mount Pleasant
answer_en: The UWTSD Mount Pleasant campus and Swansea College of Art are at 34 Alexandra Road, Swansea, SA1 5DU. The campus is within walking distance of Swansea city centre. For more information: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae campws Mount Pleasant a Choleg Celf Abertawe PCYDDS ar 34 Ffordd Alexandra, Abertawe, SA1 5DU. Mae'r campws o fewn pellter cerdded o ganol y ddinas. Am fwy o wybodaeth: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: how do I get to Carmarthen campus
sut ydw i n cyrraedd Caerfyrddin
answer_en: The UWTSD Carmarthen campus is on College Road, Carmarthen, SA31 3EP. It is accessible by bus and train — Carmarthen train station is nearby. For directions and journey planning: traveline.cymru | enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae campws Caerfyrddin PCYDDS ar Heol y Coleg, Caerfyrddin, SA31 3EP. Mae modd cyrraedd yno ar fws ac ar drên — mae gorsaf drên Caerfyrddin gerllaw. Am gynllunio taith: traveline.cymru | enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: how do I get to Lampeter
sut ydw i n cyrraedd campws Llambed
answer_en: The UWTSD Lampeter campus is on College Street, Lampeter, SA48 7ED. It is the historic founding campus of the university, established in 1822, and is home to the unique Founders' Library. Lampeter is accessible by bus via TrawsCymru and Traveline Cymru. For more: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae campws Llambed PCYDDS ar Stryd y Coleg, Llambed, SA48 7ED. Dyma gampws gwreiddiol hanesyddol y brifysgol, a sefydlwyd yn 1822, ac mae Llyfrgell y Sylfaenwyr unigryw yno. Mae Llambed yn hygyrch ar fws drwy TrawsCymru a Traveline Cymru. Am fwy: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: how do I get to Cardiff campus
answer_en: The UWTSD Cardiff campus is IQ Cardiff, located in central Cardiff. It is easily accessible by public transport from Cardiff Central train station. For the full address and directions: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111 | uwtsd.ac.uk.
answer_cy: Mae campws Caerdydd PCYDDS yn IQ Caerdydd, yng nghanol Caerdydd. Mae modd cyrraedd yno'n hawdd ar drafnidiaeth gyhoeddus o orsaf drên Caerdydd Canolog. Am gyfeiriad llawn a chyfarwyddiadau: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111 | uwtsd.ac.uk.

questions: How much are the tuition fees?

answer_en: UWTSD tuition fees for 2025/26: UK/home undergraduate students pay £9,535 per year full-time (or £39 per credit part-time, typically 60 credits per year). International undergraduate students pay £15,525 per year full-time (or £110 per credit part-time). Home postgraduate taught: £7,800 per year on campus or £6,800 online. International postgraduate taught: £16,800 per year on campus or £10,500 online. For funding and bursary information: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Ffioedd dysgu PCYDDS ar gyfer 2025/26: Myfyrwyr israddedig y DU/cartref — £9,535 y flwyddyn llawn-amser (neu £39 y credyd rhan-amser, fel arfer 60 credyd y flwyddyn). Myfyrwyr israddedig rhyngwladol — £15,525 y flwyddyn llawn-amser (neu £110 y credyd rhan-amser). Ôl-raddedig a addysgir cartref — £7,800 y flwyddyn ar gampws neu £6,800 ar-lein. Ôl-raddedig a addysgir rhyngwladol — £16,800 y flwyddyn ar gampws neu £10,500 ar-lein. Am wybodaeth ariannu: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

UWTSD offers a range of international scholarships and bursaries — for details and funding options contact: internationaloffice@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111 | uwtsd.ac.uk/international.

Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig amrywiaeth o ysgoloriaethau a bwrsarïau rhyngwladol — am fanylion a opsiynau ariannu: internationaloffice@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111 | uwtsd.ac.uk/rhyngwladol.

answer_en: UK/home undergraduate students at UWTSD pay £9,535 per year full-time (2025/26). Part-time study is £39 per credit (typically 60 credits per year). Student Finance Wales or Student Finance England can cover the full fee via a tuition fee loan, meaning most students pay nothing upfront. Apply at studentfinancewales.co.uk (Wales) or gov.uk/student-finance (England). Contact: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae myfyrwyr israddedig o'r DU/cartref yn PCYDDS yn talu £9,535 y flwyddyn llawn-amser (2025/26). Mae astudio rhan-amser yn £39 y credyd (fel arfer 60 credyd y flwyddyn). Gall Cyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru neu Loegr dalu'r ffi lawn drwy fenthyciad ffioedd dysgu — nid yw'r rhan fwyaf o fyfyrwyr yn talu dim ymlaen llaw. Am wybodaeth: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

answer_en: Home/UK postgraduate taught fees at UWTSD start from £7,800 per year on campus or £6,800 per year online (2025/26). Funding options include the Postgraduate Loan (up to £13,000 from Student Finance Wales), scholarships, and employer sponsorship. For details: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae ffioedd ôl-raddedig a addysgir cartref/DU yn PCYDDS yn dechrau o £7,800 y flwyddyn ar gampws neu £6,800 ar-lein (2025/26). Mae opsiynau ariannu ar gael gan gynnwys Benthyciad Ôl-raddedig (hyd at £13,000 drwy Gyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru). Am fanylion: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

answer_en: To apply for UWTSD student accommodation, visit the HallPad portal at uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation or contact the Accommodation team at accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111. Applications typically open in the spring — apply early as places are limited. The deadline is usually 31 July for the following academic year.

Mae ceisiadau fel arfer yn agor yn y gwanwyn — gwnewch gais yn gynnar gan fod lleoedd yn brin. Y dyddiad cau fel arfer yw 31 Gorffennaf ar gyfer y flwyddyn academaidd nesaf.

answer_en: UWTSD library opening hours vary by campus and term time. During term, libraries are typically open Monday–Friday 8am–9pm and Saturday–Sunday 10am–6pm. For exact times at your campus visit uwtsd.ac.uk/library or contact library@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

answer_en: Welsh students can apply for student finance (tuition fee loan and maintenance loan) through Student Finance Wales at studentfinancewales.co.uk. English students apply through Student Finance England at gov.uk/student-finance. Apply as early as possible — ideally before June to ensure funding arrives at the start of term. Contact UWTSD's finance team: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

Gwnewch gais cyn gynted â phosibl — cyn Mehefin yn ddelfrydol. Cysylltwch â thîm cyllid PCYDDS: studentfinance@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: Is there a hardship fund I can apply to?
I'm struggling financially what help is there
oes cronfa caledi y gallaf wneud cais amdani?
sut mae gwneud cais i gronfa caledi myfyrwyr?
dw i'n cael trafferth ariannol difrifol
answer_en: If you're in financial difficulty, UWTSD runs a Student Hardship Fund that can help with essential living costs, rent, or emergency expenses. Eligibility and application forms are available from the Student Services team or on the MyTSD portal. Contact studentfunding@uwtsd.ac.uk or Student Services on 01792 481 111. Apply as early as possible — awards are not automatic and funds are limited.
answer_cy: Os wyt ti mewn trafferth ariannol, mae PCYDDS yn rhedeg Cronfa Caledi Myfyrwyr sy'n gallu helpu gyda chostau byw hanfodol, rhent, neu wariant argyfwng. Mae'r meini prawf a'r ffurflenni ar gael gan dîm Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr neu ar borth MyTSD. Cysyllta â studentfunding@uwtsd.ac.uk neu Wasanaethau Myfyrwyr ar 01792 481 111. Gwna gais cyn gynted â phosib — nid yw dyfarniadau yn awtomatig ac mae'r cyllid yn gyfyngedig.

questions: How do I access wellbeing support?

sut i reoli pryder yn ystod cyfnod arholiadau
answer_en: UWTSD's free Wellbeing Service is available to all students — no referral needed. Whether you're feeling anxious, stressed, overwhelmed, or just finding things hard, the team is here to help. Contact them at wellbeingsupport@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit uwtsd.ac.uk/wellbeing. You can also drop in to the Wellbeing Hub on your campus or speak to your Personal Tutor as a first step. If you are in immediate crisis, call Samaritans on 116 123 (free, 24/7).
answer_cy: Mae Gwasanaeth Lles am ddim PCYDDS ar gael i bob myfyriwr — nid oes angen atgyfeiriad. Os ydych chi'n teimlo'n bryderus, dan straen, wedi llethu, neu'n cael hi'n anodd, mae'r tîm yno i helpu. Cysylltwch ar wellbeingsupport@uwtsd.ac.uk neu ewch i uwtsd.ac.uk/lles. Gallwch hefyd alw heibio i'r Hwb Lles ar eich campws neu siarad â'ch Tiwtor Personol fel cam cyntaf. Os ydych chi mewn argyfwng ar unwaith, ffoniwch y Samariaid ar 116 123 (am ddim, 24/7).

answer_en: Great that you're reaching out for support — that's exactly what your tutors and the academic team are here for! Your first point of contact is your **Personal Tutor** (find their details on Moodle or MyTSD at mytsd.uwtsd.ac.uk). For dissertation-specific guidance, your **dissertation supervisor** is the right person. If you're unsure who to contact or haven't heard back, Student Services can point you in the right direction: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

Ar gyfer arweiniad penodol ar draethawd hir, eich **goruchwyliwr traethawd hir** yw'r person iawn. Os nad ydych chi'n siŵr pwy i gysylltu neu os nad oes ymateb, gall Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr eich cyfeirio: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: in crisis and dont know what to do
cant cope anymore and losing my mind
beth sy'n digwydd os dw i'n teimlo fel lladd fy hun heno?
answer_en: I'm really sorry you're feeling like this — you're not alone and help is available right now. Please contact Samaritans on 116 123 (free, 24/7, English & Welsh) or text SHOUT to 85258. If you or someone else is in immediate danger, call 999. UWTSD's Wellbeing team can also support you — wellbeingsupport@uwtsd.ac.uk or 01792 481 111 (Mon–Fri). Togetherall (togetherall.com) offers anonymous peer support 24/7 and is free for UWTSD students.
answer_cy: Mae'n wir ddrwg gen i dy fod yn teimlo fel hyn — dwyt ti ddim ar dy ben dy hun ac mae cymorth ar gael nawr. Cysyllta â'r Samariaid ar 116 123 (am ddim, 24/7, Cymraeg a Saesneg) neu anfon SHOUT i 85258. Os wyt ti neu rywun arall mewn perygl ar unwaith, ffonia 999. Mae tîm Lles PCYDDS hefyd yn gallu dy gefnogi — wellbeingsupport@uwtsd.ac.uk neu 01792 481 111 (Llun–Gwener). Mae Togetherall (togetherall.com) yn cynnig cefnogaeth gyfoedion ddienw 24/7 yn rhad ac am ddim i fyfyrwyr PCYDDS.

questions: What activities are available at UWTSD?

answer_en: UWTSD's Students' Union (SU) is the hub for student life. What's on offer: Clubs and Societies, from sports teams and drama to academic and cultural groups, join at uwtsd.ac.uk/su or contact the SU directly. Sports, UWTSD competes in BUCS and has teams in rugby, football, netball and many more. Events, Freshers' Week, social events and union activities throughout the year. Student Voice, student reps, elections and welfare officers represent you. The UWTSD SU website is at uwtsd.ac.uk/su, email su@uwtsd.ac.uk or call 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae Undeb y Myfyrwyr PCYDDS (UM) yn ganolbwynt bywyd myfyrwyr. Dyma'r hyn sydd ar gael: Clybiau a Chymdeithasau, o dimau chwaraeon a drama i grwpiau academaidd a diwylliannol, ymunwch ar uwtsd.ac.uk/undeb neu cysylltwch â'r UM yn uniongyrchol. Chwaraeon, mae PCYDDS yn cystadlu yn BUCS ac mae ganddo dimau mewn rygbi, pêl-droed, pêl rwyd a llawer mwy. Digwyddiadau, Wythnos y Gwyrddion, digwyddiadau cymdeithasol a gweithgareddau undeb drwy'r flwyddyn. Llais Myfyrwyr, mae cynrychiolwyr myfyrwyr, etholiadau a swyddogion lles yn eich cynrychioli. Gwefan UM PCYDDS: uwtsd.ac.uk/undeb, e-bost su@uwtsd.ac.uk neu ffoniwch 01792 481 111.

a oes bws rhwng campysau PCYDDS
answer_en: You can travel between UWTSD campuses by car or public transport. TrawsCymru and Stagecoach operate bus services connecting Swansea, Carmarthen, and Lampeter. By car, Swansea to Lampeter is approximately 45–60 minutes. Plan your journey at traveline.cymru or use UWTSD's MyUniJourney Planner. For further help: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Gallwch deithio rhwng campysau PCYDDS mewn car neu ar drafnidiaeth gyhoeddus. Mae TrawsCymru a Stagecoach yn rhedeg gwasanaethau bws sy'n cysylltu Abertawe, Caerfyrddin a Llambed. Mewn car, mae Abertawe i Llambed tua 45–60 munud. Cynlluniwch eich taith ar traveline.cymru neu defnyddiwch Gynlluniwr MyUniJourney PCYDDS. Am help pellach: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: How do I contact my personal tutor?
how do I find my personal tutor
sut mae cysylltu â'm tiwtor personol?
sut mae dod o hyd i fanylion cyswllt fy nhiwtor personol
ble alla i weld pwy yw fy nhiwtor personol
sut mae e-bostio fy nhiwtor personol
pwy yw fy nhiwtor yn PCYDDS
alla i gyfarfod â'm tiwtor personol
answer_en: Your personal tutor's contact details are available on Moodle under your module pages, and on the MyTSD portal (mytsd.uwtsd.ac.uk). If you can't find them, contact your programme administrator or Student Services at studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae manylion cyswllt eich tiwtor personol ar gael ar Moodle o dan dudalennau eich modiwl, ac ar borth MyTSD (mytsd.uwtsd.ac.uk). Os na allwch ddod o hyd iddynt, cysylltwch â gweinyddwr eich rhaglen neu Wasanaethau Myfyrwyr: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: I am graduating this year — how do I register for the ceremony
how do I apply for my graduation ceremony
how many guests can I bring to graduation
finishing my degree and booking graduation
rwy'n graddio eleni — sut mae cofrestru ar gyfer y seremoni raddio
sut mae gwneud cais am seremoni raddio?
faint o westeion i'r seremoni raddio
pryd mae r graddio yn PCYDDS
sut mae cofrestru ar gyfer graddio
sut mae llogi gŵn graddio PCYDDS
faint o docynnau i westeion yn y seremoni raddio
sut mae trefnu i fynd i r seremoni raddio
graddio yn PCYDDS sut i gofrestru
a yw graddio yn awtomatig ar ôl cwblhau gradd
answer_en: Congratulations on graduating! UWTSD holds graduation ceremonies in summer (July) and winter (December/January). Once you've completed your degree you'll be invited to register via the MyTSD portal (mytsd.uwtsd.ac.uk) — registration covers ceremony attendance, gown hire, and guest tickets (typically 2–3 guests per graduate). For ceremony dates, venues, and full details see uwtsd.ac.uk/graduation. Any questions: graduation@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Llongyfarchiadau ar raddio! Mae PCYDDS yn cynnal seremonïau graddio yn yr haf (Gorffennaf) a'r gaeaf (Rhagfyr/Ionawr). Pan fyddi wedi cwblhau dy radd, cei wahoddiad i gofrestru drwy borth MyTSD (mytsd.uwtsd.ac.uk) — mae hyn yn cynnwys bod yn bresennol, llogi gŵn, a thocynnau i westeion (fel arfer 2–3 gwestai y graddedig). Am ddyddiadau, lleoliadau a manylion llawn, ewch i uwtsd.ac.uk/graddio. Cwestiynau: graduation@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: How do I submit extenuating circumstances?
sut mae gwneud cais am estyniad aseiniad
wedi methu r dyddiad cau oherwydd salwch
sut mae rhoi gwybod am amgylchiadau esgusodol
ffurflen amgylchiadau esgusodol PCYDDS ble i gael
a allaf gael estyniad ar gyfer fy aseiniad
sut mae delio ag amgylchiadau annisgwyl yn y brifysgol
answer_en: To submit extenuating circumstances at UWTSD, complete the Extenuating Circumstances form available on Moodle or from your programme administrator. Submit it as soon as possible — before the deadline if at all possible. Contact your personal tutor or Student Services for guidance: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: I gyflwyno amgylchiadau esgusodol yn PCYDDS, llenwch y ffurflen Amgylchiadau Esgusodol sydd ar gael ar Moodle neu gan weinyddwr eich rhaglen. Cyflwynwch hi cyn gynted â phosibl — cyn y dyddiad cau os yn bosibl. Cysylltwch â'ch tiwtor personol neu Wasanaethau Myfyrwyr: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.

questions: When is the next open day?
sut mae archebu lle ar ddiwrnod agored PCYDDS
sut mae ymweld â champws PCYDDS
a allaf ymweld â campws cyn ymgeisio
ymweliad campws PCYDDS sut i drefnu
answer_en: UWTSD holds open days throughout the year at all campuses. To see upcoming dates and book your place, visit uwtsd.ac.uk/opendays. You can also contact admissions for a personalised campus visit: admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
answer_cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnal diwrnodau agored drwy gydol y flwyddyn ym mhob campws. I weld dyddiadau sydd ar y gweill a chadw'ch lle, ewch i uwtsd.ac.uk/dyddiau-agored. Gallwch hefyd gysylltu â derbyniadau am ymweliad campws personol: admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk | 01792 481 111.
